label: Partner
desc: Key stakeholder, owner and decision-maker in equal partnership. Firm leadership.
quals: MD MPH and/or PhD, or industry leadership
industry: MBB/D consulting or peak industry experience — may have been a former Partner

label: Associate Partner
desc: Leads projects and initiatives in areas of expertise. On track to equity partnership.
quals: MD MPH and/or PhD, or industry leadership
industry: MBB EM experience or peak industry consulting experience

label: Project Director / Senior Manager
desc: Leads projects and initiatives with little oversight. Owns client relationships.
industry: MBB EM / Senior ASC experience or peak industry consulting

label: Project Manager / Manager
desc: Leads key workstreams for projects and initiatives.
quals: MD MPH and/or PhD, or industry leadership

label: Senior Expert
desc: Senior industry leader, supporter of FH’s mission. Firm-of-record expert.

label: Expert
desc: Expert in chosen field, supports FH on workstreams.
industry: Clinical or scientific domain expert with previous experience

label: Senior Consultant
desc: Very experienced consulting team member, leads workstreams.
quals: MD / MBBS / PhD and relevant masters
industry: Fellowed (eg RACGP), or at least PGY6 · may have MBB/Big4 experience

label: Fellow
desc: Recently fellowed in a clinical specialty without consulting experience, but with notable industry or peak body involvement. Supports with deep technical knowledge, with the intent of building exposure to consulting.
quals: MD / MBBS / PhD and relevant masters

label: Junior Fellow
desc: Nearing fellowship in a clinical specialty and without consulting experience, but with notable industry or peak body involvement.
quals: MD / MBBS / PhD and relevant masters
industry: Advanced trainee with significant relevant experience · no MBB experience

label: Consultant
desc: Experienced team member, capable of supporting & leading within workstreams.
quals: MD / MBBS / PhD and relevant masters
industry: Over 4 years of clinical experience · may have MBB Senior BA background

label: Consultant (junior)
desc: Experienced consultant, recently graduated from medical school.
quals: MD / MBBS, or late-stage PhD candidate
industry: Up to 4 yrs clinical/other relevant experience

label: Senior Analyst
desc: Experienced analyst, recently graduated from medical school.
industry: Senior undergraduate (final year) · may have several years at FH or other

label: Analyst
desc: Emerging consulting team member, capable of supporting across work.

label: Junior Analyst
desc: New team member — probationary rate (6–12 months).
industry: May have some experience or training

label: Intern
quals: MD or other relevant degree candidate
